popularStory.headline: John Stewart, 1st Earl of Atholl b. 1440
popularStory.description:
John Stewart, 1st Earl of Atholl (c. 1440 – 15 September 1512), also known as Sir John Stewart of Balveny, was a Scottish nobleman and ambassador to England (in 1484).

He was the oldest child of Joan …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Stewart 1st Earl of Atholl於1439年9月21日出生在蘇格蘭費伏時，他的父親James Stewart Black Knight of Lorne40歲，母親Joan Beaufort Queen Consort of Scotland31歲。他於1459年與Lady Margaret Douglas of Douglas在蘇格蘭培爾培斯結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他於1484年在英國英格蘭安德 維亞爾紐可亞斯特爾 武朋被列為ambassador to england。他去世於1512年9月15日在蘇格蘭培爾培斯享年72歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭培爾登可爾德登可爾德 凱德拉爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Stewart 1st Earl of Atholl于1439年9月21日出生在苏格兰費伏时，他的父亲James Stewart Black Knight of Lorne40岁，母亲Joan Beaufort Queen Consort of Scotland31岁。他于1459年与Lady Margaret Douglas of Douglas在苏格兰培爾培斯结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他于1484年在英国英格兰安德 維亞爾紐可亞斯特爾 武朋被列为ambassador to england。他去世于1512年9月15日在苏格兰培爾培斯享年72岁，埋葬在苏格兰培爾登可爾德登可爾德 凱德拉爾。

nameMeanings.name: Stewart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: originally an occupational name for an administrative official of an estate, from Middle English stiward, Old English stigweard, stīweard, a compound of stig ‘house(hold)’ + weard ‘guardian’. In the Anglo-Saxon period this title was used of an officer controlling the domestic affairs of a household, especially of the royal household; after the Norman Conquest it was also used more widely as the native equivalent of Seneschal, for the steward of a manor or manager of an estate. In Scotland the term was also used of a magistrate originally appointed by the king to administer crown lands, forming a stewartry.

History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland, the royal family of Scotland from the 14th century, and of England from 1603, when James VI of Scotland acceded to the English throne as James I. There were many minor branches of the family left in Britain after the flight of James II in 1688, but not every bearer of the surname can claim relationship with the royal house, even in Scotland. Every great house in medieval England and Scotland had its steward, and in many cases the office gave rise to a hereditary surname. The fall of the house of Stuart in Britain, conversely, led to the establishment of several highly placed branches bearing this surname in continental Europe, which are in most cases related to the old Scottish royal family.

variants.name: Stuart
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeenshire and Banffshire): variant of   Stewart  . This French form of the name, there being no W in the French language, was adopted by Mary, Queen of Scots, on her return to Scotland in 1561 and has since come to be more popular among royalists than the earlier spellings.
History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland (see note at   Stewart  ).

variants.name: Stewardson
meanings: English (Lancashire and Westmorland): patronymic from Middle English stiward ‘steward’ (see Stewart ) + -son ‘son of the steward’.

variants.name: Steward
meanings: English (London and East Anglia): variant of   Stewart  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Stewart 1st Earl of Atholl was born on 21 September 1439, in Fife, Scotland, his father, James Stewart Black Knight of Lorne, was 40 and his mother, Joan Beaufort Queen Consort of Scotland, was 31. He married Lady Margaret Douglas of Douglas in 1459, in Perth, Perthshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. In 1484, at the age of 45, his occupation is listed as ambassador to england in Newcastle upon Tyne, Tyne and Wear, England, United Kingdom. He died on 15 September 1512, in Perth, Perthshire, Scotland, at the age of 72, and was buried in Dunkeld Cathedral, Dunkeld, Perthshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Stewart 1st Earl of Atholl est né le 21 septembre 1439, à Fife, Écosse, son père, James Stewart Black Knight of Lorne, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Joan Beaufort Queen Consort of Scotland, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Lady Margaret Douglas of Douglas en 1459, à Perth, Perthshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. En 1484, à l’âge de 45 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est ambassador to england à Newcastle upon Tyne, Tyne and Wear, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 15 septembre 1512, à Perth, Perthshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterré à Dunkeld Cathedral, Dunkeld, Perthshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Stewart 1st Earl of Atholl am 21. September 1439 in Fife, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater James Stewart Black Knight of Lorne 40 und seine Mutter Joan Beaufort Queen Consort of Scotland 31. Er hat 1459 in Perth, Perthshire, Scotland Lady Margaret Douglas of Douglas geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. 1484, als er 45 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als ambassador to england in Newcastle upon Tyne, Tyne and Wear, England, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb am 15. September 1512 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Perth, Perthshire, Scotland und wurde in Dunkeld Cathedral, Dunkeld, Perthshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Stewart 1st Earl of Atholl è nato il il 21 settembre 1439 nel Fife, Scotland, il suo padre, James Stewart Black Knight of Lorne, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Joan Beaufort Queen Consort of Scotland, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Lady Margaret Douglas of Douglas nel 1459, nel Perth, Perthshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Nel 1484, all'età di 45 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come ambassador to england nel Newcastle upon Tyne, Tyne and Wear, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì il 15 settembre 1512, nel Perth, Perthshire, Scotland, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolto a Dunkeld Cathedral, Dunkeld, Perthshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Stewart 1st Earl of Athollが1439年9月21日にスコットランドフィフで生まれた時，父James Stewart Black Knight of Lorneは40歳，母Joan Beaufort Queen Consort of Scotlandは31歳であった。1459年にスコットランドペルスシュアイアペルスでLady Margaret Douglas of Douglasと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。1484年，45歳の時，イギリスイギリストイン アンド ウエアルニューカストル ウプオン トインでの職業はambassador to englandと記録されている。彼は1512年9月15日にスコットランドペルスシュアイアペルスで72歳で死去し，スコットランドペルスシュアイアダンケルドダンケルド カスエドラルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Stewart 1st Earl of Atholl(이)가 1439년 9월 21일 스컷랜드 피프에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 James Stewart Black Knight of Lorne(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Beaufort Queen Consort of Scotland(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1459년 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 퍼스에서 Lady Margaret Douglas of Douglas(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1484년, 45세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 잉글랜드 타이니 앤드 위르 뉴카스틀 업 타이니에서 ambassador to england이었다. 그는 1512년 9월 15일 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 퍼스에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 던켈드 던켈드 캐테드럴에 묻혔다.

pt.21 September 1439–15 September 1512: 21 de setembro de 1439–15 de setembro de 1512
pt.Balveny Castle, Fife, Fifeshire, Scotlan: Bow of Fife, Fife, Escócia, United Kingdom
pt.Newcastle-upon-Tyne, Metropolitan Boroug: Newcastle upon Tyne, Tyne and Wear, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Stewart 1st Earl of Atholl nasceu em 21 de setembro de 1439, em Fife, Scotland, seu pai, James Stewart Black Knight of Lorne, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Joan Beaufort Queen Consort of Scotland, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Margaret Douglas of Douglas em 1459, em Perth, Perthshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Em 1484, com 45 anos, sua profissão aparece como ambassador to england em Newcastle upon Tyne, Tyne and Wear, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 15 de setembro de 1512, em Perth, Perthshire, Scotland, com 72 anos, e foi sepultado em Dunkeld Cathedral, Dunkeld, Perthshire, Scotland.

ru.Balveny Castle, Fife, Fifeshire, Scotlan: боу оф фиф, фиф, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.Newcastle-upon-Tyne, Metropolitan Boroug: нюкастл упон тин, тин анд вир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Stewart 1st Earl of Atholl родился 21 сентября 1439 г. в местности фиф, Шотландия, его отцу по имени James Stewart Black Knight of Lorne было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Beaufort Queen Consort of Scotland, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Margaret Douglas of Douglas в 1459 г. в местности пирт, пиртшир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. В 1484 году, в возрасте 45 лет,  он работал по профессии ambassador to england в местности нюкастл упон тин, тин анд вир, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер 15 сентября 1512 г. в местности пирт, пиртшир, Шотландия в возрасте 72 лет и был похоронен в местности дункелд кэтедраль, дункелд, пиртшир, Шотландия.

es.21 September 1439–15 September 1512: 21 de septiembre de 1439–15 de septiembre de 1512
es.Balveny Castle, Fife, Fifeshire, Scotlan: Bow of Fife, Fife, Escocia, Reino Unido
es.Newcastle-upon-Tyne, Metropolitan Boroug: Newcastle upon Tyne, Tyne and Wear, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Stewart 1st Earl of Atholl nació el 21 de septiembre de 1439, en Fife, Scotland, su papá, James Stewart Black Knight of Lorne, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Joan Beaufort Queen Consort of Scotland, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Lady Margaret Douglas of Douglas en 1459, en Perth, Perthshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. En 1484, a la edad de 45 años, su ocupación registrada era ambassador to england en Newcastle upon Tyne, Tyne and Wear, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió el 15 de septiembre de 1512, en Perth, Perthshire, Scotland, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultado en Dunkeld Cathedral, Dunkeld, Perthshire, Scotland.
